data.title: METLEN Energy & Metals: 2025 Financial Results
data.description: METLEN Energy & Metals PLC, listed on both the LSE (MTLN) and Athens Exchange (MTLNr.AT), shared their FY 2025 results. Their revenue increased by 25% to €7,107 million. The company also trades on Bloomberg under MTLN.LN and MTLN.GA, with an ADR of MYTHY US.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- DriveYo LLC/
data.description: DriveYo LLC has recently announced the launch of an AI platform aimed at revealing undisclosed car deal markups to consumers. According to the company, this initiative could potentially lead to the return of $20 billion to consumers. The news release, issued on 03-Apr-2026 over PR Newswire, highlights the changes made to the 2nd paragraph from the original version. The platform seeks to address hidden markups in car deals, ultimately benefiting consumers by potentially reclaiming a significant sum of $20 billion.

data.title: Bitcoin hits new high at $72K with $280M in shorts liquidated. Global markets surge post US-Iran ceasefire; BTC bear positions remain open.
data.description: The ceasefire agreement between the US and Iran led to a rally in Bitcoin and global markets. However, despite this positive movement, the latest data indicates that the majority of Bitcoin bears have yet to close their positions. This indicates ongoing uncertainty in the market despite the recent upturn.

data.title: Raiffeisen Bank reaffirms long-standing commitment to powering core retail services with Finastra
data.description: Finastra, a renowned financial services software leader, has revealed a successful partnership of more than three decades with Raiffeisen Bank Hungary. This collaboration has significantly contributed to supporting bank operations and serving millions of customers across various countries. The strong relationship between these two entities continues to thrive as they work together to provide essential financial services. The announcement was made in London on April 9, 2026.

data.title: TON Price Prediction: Toncoin at $1.23, may hit $1.30 by month-end. Neutral RSI (42.88) hints at possible rise soon.
data.description: Toncoin is currently trading at $1.23 with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) sitting at 42.88. Analysts predict a potential increase to the $1.30 resistance level within the next 30 days if buyers manage to surpass the current consolidation pattern.
